featured.title: Multi-agent development
featured.description: VS Code is your home for multi-agent development. Run multiple AI agent sessions in parallel, across different projects, environments, and agent harnesses.

highlights.title: MCP Apps support
highlights.description: Give agents a visual voice with MCP Apps support in VS Code.

highlights.title: AI core concepts overview
highlights.description: Get an overview of the core concepts and how AI agents work in VS Code.

highlights.title: New in Insiders
highlights.description: Support for agent plugins to install agent customizations. Fork a chat conversation with `/fork` to explore alternative paths.
